_comment: Allowlist for scripts/validate-framework.js. consumerFiles: paths that exist only in CONSUMER repos — the framework's managed docs legitimately cite them ('if present' cites). Supports exact repo-relative paths and 'dir/**' prefixes. knownIssues: temporarily suppressed genuinely-broken links, each { file, target, note } — fix the doc and remove the entry; stale entries fail validation. hookLibraries: repo-relative paths of .claude/hooks/ files that are shared libraries require()d by entry hooks rather than registered in settings.json — the hook-wiring check skips them; stale entries fail validation. Empty as of v2.44: every non-test .js under .claude/hooks/ is a registered entry hook.
